name: E900_clear_open
prompt:
First-person walking perspective at chest height along a very wide open park path. The large clean asphalt path stretches far ahead through an expansive open grass park with residential homes in the far distance.

The path is in excellent condition — very wide, completely flat, dry and clean. Excellent visibility extends far ahead. No obstacles, no other users, no hazards of any kind. The path is ideal walking conditions.

The wide open park path extends ahead with perfect conditions. The surface is dry and even. Full visibility exists to the far end of the visible path. The route is completely safe with excellent sightlines and no hazards present.
negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
